intro: Hemionitis duclouxii, also known as Ducloux's hemionitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The bioactive constituents of Hemionitis duclouxii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Hemionitis duclouxii is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, as well as dried extracts, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
